author: Ivan Verbovoy
name: Depth Recurrence + XSA + LeakyReLU² + GPTQ-lite + zstd-22
blurb: 3 unique blocks x 4 repeats (12 effective layers), dim=832, with Cross-Repeat Skip, XSA on last 4 layers, LeakyReLU(0.5)², GPTQ-lite quantization, SWA, Muon WD=0.04, zstd-22 compression. 4300 steps in 600s on 8xH100.
